title: Acoelorraphe pimo
taxonomy: Acoelorraphe pimo is a species of palm tree in the family Arecaceae. It is native to the Caribbean and parts of Central America. The species is classified as a monotypic genus, meaning it is the only species within the Acoelorraphe genus. Acoelorraphe pimo is further classified as a member of the tribe Cocoseae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species.
